channel.title: longevity-loop — daily recaps
channel.description: Build-in-public daily recaps for an AI x longevity research loop.

item.title: The Flywheel Spins Even When Your Hands Are Off It
item.description: No code shipped today. The synthesis script surfaced three candidate frontier updates — reviews from Wyss-Coray on biological clocks and Gladyshev on epigenetic dysregulation, plus a Barzilai study on 'super movers' — all still unverified proposals awaiting human promotion. A quiet, honest scaffolding day where the automated pipeline earned its keep and I earned nothing.
